name: Sample Genomic Navigation Tasks
description: A starter set of 10 tasks across 3 difficulty tiers

tasks.title: Navigate to chromosome 7
tasks.description: Use the search bar to navigate to chromosome 7, position 55,000,000. Zoom in until you can see approximately 10kb of sequence.
hints: Use the zoom controls or scroll wheel to zoom in

tasks.title: Zoom to base-pair resolution
tasks.description: Navigate to chr17:7,674,200-7,674,300 and zoom in until you can see individual base pairs.
hints: Type the coordinates in the search bar
Keep zooming in until letters (A, T, C, G) appear

tasks.title: Open a track
tasks.description: Open the track selector and add any gene annotation track to your view.
hints: Click the '+' button or 'Open track selector'
Look for tracks with 'gene' or 'annotation' in the name

tasks.title: Find the TP53 gene
tasks.description: Navigate to the TP53 gene. Make sure the entire gene is visible in your viewport.
hints: Try searching for 'TP53' in the search bar
TP53 is located at approximately chr17:7,668,402-7,687,550

tasks.title: Attention check
tasks.description: What color is the sky on a clear day? Select the correct answer.

tasks.title: Inspect a genomic region
tasks.description: Navigate to the region chr17:7,570,000-7,580,000. This region contains part of the TP53 gene.
hints: Zoom to fit the entire region in your view

tasks.title: Multi-track comparison
tasks.description: Navigate to chr1:155,000,000-156,000,000 and ensure at least 2 tracks are visible.
hints: Navigate to the region first using the search bar
Open the track selector to add additional tracks

tasks.title: Find the BRCA1 coding region
tasks.description: Navigate to the BRCA1 gene and zoom in to see its exon structure clearly.

tasks.title: Quick check
tasks.description: How many nucleotide bases are in DNA? Select the correct answer.

tasks.title: Examine a structural variant region
tasks.description: Navigate to chr13:32,300,000-32,400,000 (within the BRCA2 gene region). Zoom in to approximately 50kb window to examine the region.
hints: Use the search bar to navigate to the coordinates
Zoom in gradually to see structural features
Look for read alignment patterns that suggest structural variation
